ideation: This animation sequence will depict the robot exploring a desert landscape, using its arms to express curiosity and wonder. The sequence will involve a combination of reaching, scanning, and shading the eyes to represent the sun's glare. Frame 1 will show the arms at rest; frame 2 will show the robot reaching out as if to touch a mirage; frame 3 will show the robot shading its eyes from the sun; frame 4 will show the robot scanning the horizon; and frame 5 will show the robot returning to a resting pose. This sequence uses subtle arm movements to create a sense of exploration and discovery.

frames.beat: arms rest, still and quiet desert
right arm reaches out, perhaps to a mirage
both arms rise to shade eyes from the harsh sun
arms sweep wide, scanning the vast empty horizon
arms return to rest, the desert is explored
